headline: Cboe Global Markets Reports Trading Volume for April 2026
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (Cboe: CBOE), a leading global markets operator and pioneer in equity derivatives, today reported April trading volume statistics across its global business lines.

headline: NBZ Investment Advisors Adds $3.8 Million Worth of This Global Equity ETF
summary: This actively managed ETF invests in a diversified portfolio of global equities, targeting long-term capital growth and income.

headline: Credit Spreads Are the Signal That Will Make or Break VGHY in 2026
summary: State Street’s own 2026 ETF outlook called active fixed income the “global product center of gravity”, which is a striking concession from the firm that built the largest passive high-yield ETF on the market. That backdrop frames the case for Vanguard High-Yield Active ETF (CBOE:VGHY), Vanguard’s first actively managed high-yield bond ETF. Launched in September ... headline: AMZW’s Weekly Payouts Drop 79% as Volatility Collapses; Can Investors Count on Them?
summary: Roundhill’s weekly-pay ETF lineup has built a following among income seekers willing to swap diversification for fat, frequent checks. Roundhill AMZN WeeklyPay ETF (CBOE:AMZW) is the Amazon flavor, and its weekly distributions have ranged from $0.152133 to $0.737091 per share since launch. The question is whether that paycheck holds up when Amazon’s stock cools or ... AMZW’s Weekly Payouts Drop 79% as Volatility Collapses; Can Investors Count on Them?

headline: OSB GROUP PLC - Transaction in Own Shares
summary: OSB GROUP PLCISIN: GB00BLDRH36005 May 2026 LEI number: 213800ZBKL9BHSL2K459 OSB GROUP PLC (the “Company”) Share Buyback Programme – Transactions in Own Shares The Company announces that, for the period from 27 April 2026 to 01 May 2026, inclusive, it had purchased a total of 1,060,756 of its ordinary shares of £0.01 each (the "ordinary shares") on the London Stock Exchange, CBOE BXE ,CBOE CXE and Aquis Exchange, through the Company’s broker Jefferies International Limited as detailed below.
